home.title: NextJS Template — Manage Your Daily Tasks
home.description: The best place to manage your daily tasks and projects. Fast, secure and beautiful.

login.title: Login — NextJS Template
login.description: Sign in to your NextJS Template account to access your dashboard and projects.

register.title: Create Account — NextJS Template
register.description: Sign up and start managing your projects for free. Fast registration, no credit card required.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password — NextJS Template
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password — NextJS Template
resetPassword.description: Set a new secure password for your NextJS Template account.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email — NextJS Template
verifyEmail.description: Please verify your email address to complete your registration.

verifyEmailNotice.title: Check Your Email — NextJS Template
verifyEmailNotice.description: We sent you a verification link. Please check your inbox and spam folder.

dashboard.title: Dashboard — NextJS Template
dashboard.description: Manage your projects, tasks and team from your personal dashboard.

profile.title: Profile — NextJS Template
profile.description: View and update your personal profile, preferences and account settings.

notFound.title: Page Not Found — NextJS Template
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

error.title: Something Went Wrong — NextJS Template
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support.
